productName: Seattle Bubble Works- Hash-Infused Joint - Super Lemon Haze (S) - .75g
description: Ready-to-spark sativa infused pre-roll of Super Lemon Haze, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of lemon, citrus, and lime, delivering a bright, heady lift. Pace yourself.
